command:
cd /tmp/moreno-ai-setup

echo "=== FETCH LATEST WORKFLOW ==="
curl -s -H "X-N8N-API-KEY: eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiI0YjkyYzA5MS1kMTM3LTRiYmYtODIyMy03ODFhMjZjZGQwODEiLCJpc3MiOiJuOG4iLCJhdWQiOiJwdWJsaWMtYXBpIiwianRpIjoiMDAxZTM0OWYtNjYzMC00OTQyLTljOTQtZGEyZjk4YzlmOGYzIiwiaWF0IjoxNzgwNzk5OTExfQ.SRoqA9YJaMud-bhWB1KqGOzat9f8hXDlqe9aHxIMerE" "http://localhost:5678/api/v1/workflows/pWnqKmUwimLYVZ5P" -o /tmp/router-live.json
echo "Fetched:  bytes"

echo "=== MODIFY ==="
echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/modify_router.py
python3 /tmp/modify_router.py

echo "=== PUSH TO N8N ==="
curl -s -X PUT "http://localhost:5678/api/v1/workflows/pWnqKmUwimLYVZ5P" -H "X-N8N-API-KEY: eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiI0YjkyYzA5MS1kMTM3LTRiYmYtODIyMy03ODFhMjZjZGQwODEiLCJpc3MiOiJuOG4iLCJhdWQiOiJwdWJsaWMtYXBpIiwianRpIjoiMDAxZTM0OWYtNjYzMC00OTQyLTljOTQtZGEyZjk4YzlmOGYzIiwiaWF0IjoxNzgwNzk5OTExfQ.SRoqA9YJaMud-bhWB1KqGOzat9f8hXDlqe9aHxIMerE" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d @/tmp/router-modified.json -o /tmp/put-result.json
python3 -c "
import json
d=json.load(open('/tmp/put-result.json'))
err=d.get('message','')
if err:
    print('ERROR:', err)
else:
    nodes=[n.get('name') for n in d.get('nodes',[])]
    print('Name:', d.get('name'))
    print('Nodes:', nodes)
    print('Active:', d.get('active'))
"

echo "=== REACTIVATE ==="
curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:5678/api/v1/workflows/pWnqKmUwimLYVZ5P/activate" -H "X-N8N-API-KEY: eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiI0YjkyYzA5MS1kMTM3LTRiYmYtODIyMy03ODFhMjZjZGQwODEiLCJpc3MiOiJuOG4iLCJhdWQiOiJwdWJsaWMtYXBpIiwianRpIjoiMDAxZTM0OWYtNjYzMC00OTQyLTljOTQtZGEyZjk4YzlmOGYzIiwiaWF0IjoxNzgwNzk5OTExfQ.SRoqA9YJaMud-bhWB1KqGOzat9f8hXDlqe9aHxIMerE" -o /tmp/act.json
python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('/tmp/act.json')); print('Active:', d.get('active'), '| Err:', d.get('message','none'))"
